## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Privacy and security

State whether the change affects network requests, provider routing, credentials, local history or IPC.

## Validation

- [ ] Build completed
- [ ] Tests completed
- [ ] KDE behavior checked when relevant
- [ ] GNOME/Wayland fallback considered when relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets or private translation text included
